channel.title: 192nd Semiannual General Conference

itunes:owner.itunes:name: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints

channel.itunes:author: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints

item.title: Helping the Poor and Distressed
item.description:
Helping the Poor and Distressed by President Dallin H. Oaks, First Counselor in the First Presidency given in the Saturday Morning session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
The Church of Jesus Christ is committed to serving those in need, and it is also committed to cooperating with others in that effort.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President Dallin H. Oaks, First Counselor in the First Presidency

item.title: Jesus Christ Is the Strength of Youth
item.description:
Jesus Christ Is the Strength of Youth by Elder Dieter F. Uchtdorf, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Morning session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
Put your trust in Jesus Christ. He will lead you the right way. He is your strength.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Dieter F. Uchtdorf, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Seeing More of Jesus Christ in Our Lives
item.description:
Seeing More of Jesus Christ in Our Lives by Sister Tracy Y. Browning, Second Counselor in the Primary General Presidency given in the Saturday Morning session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
The Savior invites us to see our lives through Him in order to see more of Him in our lives.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Sister Tracy Y. Browning, Second Counselor in the Primary General Presidency

item.title: A Framework for Personal Revelation
item.description:
A Framework for Personal Revelation by Elder Dale G. Renlund, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Morning session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
We need to understand the framework within which the Holy Ghost functions. When we operate within the framework, the Holy Ghost can unleash astonishing insight.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Dale G. Renlund, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Let Doing Good Be Our Normal
item.description:
Let Doing Good Be Our Normal by Elder Rafael E. Pino, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Morning session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
If we are steadfast and immovable in doing good, our customs will help us to stay on the covenant path.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Rafael E. Pino, Of the Seventy

item.title: The Eternal Principle of Love
item.description:
The Eternal Principle of Love by Elder Hugo Montoya, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Morning session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
Our Heavenly Father’s love for each of His children is real. He is there for each one.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Hugo Montoya, Of the Seventy

item.title: This Day
item.description:
This Day by Elder Ronald A. Rasband, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Morning session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
Our living prophet is doing his part to flood the earth with the Book of Mormon. We must follow his lead.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Ronald A. Rasband, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: What Is True?
item.description:
What Is True? by President Russell M. Nelson, President of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints given in the Saturday Morning session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
God is the source of all truth. The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints embraces all truth that God conveys to His children.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President Russell M. Nelson, President of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints

item.title: Sustaining of General Authorities, Area Seventies, and General Officers
item.description:
Sustaining of General Authorities, Area Seventies, and General Officers by Presented by President Henry B. Eyring, Second Counselor in the First Presidency given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
undefined
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Presented by President Henry B. Eyring, Second Counselor in the First Presidency

item.title: Follow Jesus Christ with Footsteps of Faith
item.description:
Follow Jesus Christ with Footsteps of Faith by President M. Russell Ballard, Acting President of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
Christ can carry us today through difficult times. He did it for the early pioneers, and He will do it now for each one of us.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President M. Russell Ballard, Acting President of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Beauty for Ashes: The Healing Path of Forgiveness
item.description:
Beauty for Ashes: The Healing Path of Forgiveness by Sister Kristin M. Yee, Second Counselor in the Relief Society General Presidency given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
To live in such a way that you give beauty for the ashes of your life is an act of faith that follows the Savior.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Sister Kristin M. Yee, Second Counselor in the Relief Society General Presidency

item.title: Be Perfected in Him
item.description:
Be Perfected in Him by Elder Paul V. Johnson, Of the Presidency of the Seventy given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
Our perfection is only possible through God’s grace.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Paul V. Johnson, Of the Presidency of the Seventy

item.title: In Partnership with the Lord
item.description:
In Partnership with the Lord by Elder Ulisses Soares, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
The restored gospel of Jesus Christ proclaims the principle of full partnership between woman and man, both in mortal life and in the eternities.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Ulisses Soares, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: And They Sought to See Jesus Who He Was
item.description:
And They Sought to See Jesus Who He Was by Elder James W. McConkie III, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
I witness that Jesus lives, that He knows us, and that He has the power to heal, to transform, and to forgive.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder James W. McConkie III, Of the Seventy

item.title: Building a Life Resistant to the Adversary
item.description:
Building a Life Resistant to the Adversary by Elder Jorge F. Zeballos, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
I pray that we may continue to build our lives following the plans and technical specifications of the divine design authored by our Heavenly Father.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Jorge F. Zeballos, Of the Seventy

item.title: The Doctrine of Belonging
item.description:
The Doctrine of Belonging by Elder D. Todd Christofferson, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
The doctrine of belonging comes down to this for each of us: I am one with Christ in the gospel covenant.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder D. Todd Christofferson, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Our Earthly Stewardship
item.description:
Our Earthly Stewardship by Bishop Gérald Caussé, Presiding Bishop given in the Saturday Evening session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
Great spiritual blessings are promised to those who love and care for the earth and their fellow men and women.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Bishop Gérald Caussé, Presiding Bishop

item.title: Wholehearted
item.description:
Wholehearted by Sister Michelle D. Craig, First Counselor in the Young Women General Presidency given in the Saturday Evening session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
We should be followers of Jesus who are joyful and wholehearted in our own personal journey of discipleship.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Sister Michelle D. Craig, First Counselor in the Young Women General Presidency

item.title: Are You Still Willing?
item.description:
Are You Still Willing? by Elder Kevin W. Pearson, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Evening session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
Our willingness to follow Jesus Christ is directly proportionate to the amount of time we commit to be in holy places.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Kevin W. Pearson, Of the Seventy

item.title: Courage to Proclaim the Truth
item.description:
Courage to Proclaim the Truth by Elder Denelson Silva, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Evening session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
Once we learn the truth, the Lord gives us the opportunity to do what He would do if He were here today.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Denelson Silva, Of the Seventy

item.title: Drawing Closer to the Savior
item.description:
Drawing Closer to the Savior by Elder Neil L. Andersen, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Evening session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
Seeking to know and love the Savior, we separate ourselves from the world through covenants with God, being distinct, uncommon, and special, without isolating ourselves from others who believe differently.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Neil L. Andersen, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Lifted Up upon the Cross
item.description:
Lifted Up upon the Cross by Elder Jeffrey R. Holland, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Sunday Morning session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
To be a follower of Jesus Christ, one must sometimes carry a burden and go where sacrifice is required and suffering is inevitable.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Jeffrey R. Holland, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: His Yoke Is Easy and His Burden Is Light
item.description:
His Yoke Is Easy and His Burden Is Light by Sister J. Anette Dennis, First Counselor in the Relief Society General Presidency given in the Sunday Morning session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
Let us remember that each person on this earth is a child of God and He loves each one.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Sister J. Anette Dennis, First Counselor in the Relief Society General Presidency

item.title: Happy and Forever
item.description:
Happy and Forever by Elder Gerrit W. Gong, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Sunday Morning session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
True, enduring joy and eternity with those we love are the very essence of God’s plan of happiness.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Gerrit W. Gong, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Patterns of Discipleship
item.description:
Patterns of Discipleship by Elder Joseph W. Sitati, Emeritus Member of the Seventy given in the Sunday Morning session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
Learning about Christ and His ways leads us to know and to love Him.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Joseph W. Sitati, Emeritus Member of the Seventy

item.title: Lasting Discipleship
item.description:
Lasting Discipleship by President Steven J. Lund, Young Men General President given in the Sunday Morning session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
We can find spiritual confidence and peace as we nurture holy habits and righteous routines that can sustain and fuel the fires of our faith.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President Steven J. Lund, Young Men General President

item.title: Put On Thy Strength, O Zion
item.description:
Put On Thy Strength, O Zion by Elder David A. Bednar, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Sunday Morning session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
Each of us should evaluate our temporal and spiritual priorities sincerely and prayerfully.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder David A. Bednar, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Overcome the World and Find Rest
item.description:
Overcome the World and Find Rest by President Russell M. Nelson, President of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints given in the Sunday Morning session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
Find rest from the intensity, uncertainty, and anguish of this world by overcoming the world through your covenants with God.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President Russell M. Nelson, President of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints

item.title: Legacy of Encouragement
item.description:
Legacy of Encouragement by President Henry B. Eyring, Second Counselor in the First Presidency given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
I encourage you to continue striving to qualify to return to Heavenly Father and Jesus Christ.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President Henry B. Eyring, Second Counselor in the First Presidency

item.title: The Answer Is Jesus
item.description:
The Answer Is Jesus by Elder Ryan K. Olsen, Of the Seventy given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
No matter how difficult or confusing the challenges may be, you can always remember that the answer is simple: it is always Jesus.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Ryan K. Olsen, Of the Seventy

item.title: That They Might Know Thee
item.description:
That They Might Know Thee by Elder Jonathan S. Schmitt, Of the Seventy given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
()
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. item.itunes:author: Elder Jonathan S. Schmitt, Of the Seventy

item.title: The Virtue of the Word
item.description:
The Virtue of the Word by Elder Mark D. Eddy, Of the Seventy given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
There is virtue in the words of ancient and modern prophets precisely because their words are the Lord’s words.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Mark D. Eddy, Of the Seventy

item.title: Nourishing and Bearing Your Testimony
item.description:
Nourishing and Bearing Your Testimony by Elder Gary E. Stevenson, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
I invite you to seek opportunities to bear your testimony in word and in deed.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Gary E. Stevenson, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: We Can Do Hard Things through Him
item.description:
We Can Do Hard Things through Him by Elder Isaac K. Morrison, Of the Seventy given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
We grow in our discipleship when we exercise faith in the Lord during difficult times.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Isaac K. Morrison, Of the Seventy

item.title: Be True to God and His Work
item.description:
Be True to God and His Work by Elder Quentin L. Cook, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
We all need to seek our own testimony of Jesus Christ, bridle our passions, repent of our sins, and be true to God and His work.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Quentin L. Cook, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Focus on the Temple
item.description:
Focus on the Temple by President Russell M. Nelson, President of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 192nd Semiannual General Conference on Fri Sep 30 2022
I promise that increased time in the temple will bless your life in ways nothing else can.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
